code:
import io

let line = io.read_line()
mut s = ""
match line
when Some(x)
  s = x
when None
  s = ""
end

mut depth = 0
mut bad = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(s)
while i < n and not bad
  let b = string.byte_at(s, i)
  match b
  when Some(c)
    if c == 40
      depth = depth + 1
    else if c == 41
      if depth == 0
        bad = true
      else
        depth = depth - 1
      end
    end
  when None
    bad = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if bad or depth != 0
  print("NO")
else
  print("YES")
end
